title: 1.1: Refactors all 3 silence route descriptors in routes.tsx (SilencesTablePage, NewSilencePage, ExistingSilenceEditorPage) to lazy-load dedicated standalone page modules instead of the shared Silences module
1.2: Wraps all 3 standalone silence route pages (NewSilencePage, ExistingSilenceEditorPage, SilencesTablePage) in AlertmanagerPageWrapper with navId='silences'

1.3: Exports all 3 standalone silence route page components (NewSilencePage, ExistingSilenceEditorPage, SilencesTablePage) as the module default export wrapped in withErrorBoundary, with no named export of the page component
1.4: Moves new-silence query parsing and default-form derivation into NewSilencePage.tsx helper logic that feeds SilencesEditor
1.5: Provides a fallback default or render guard for absent selected Alertmanager in NewSilencePage.tsx for the /alerting/silence/new route
1.6: Refactors ExistingSilenceEditor in SilencesEditor.tsx to read selected Alertmanager from AlertmanagerContext instead of an alertManagerSourceName prop
1.7: Provides a fallback default or render guard for absent selected Alertmanager in SilencesEditor.tsx for the /alerting/silence/:id/edit route
1.8: Refactors SilencesTable in SilencesTable.tsx to read selected Alertmanager from AlertmanagerContext instead of an alertManagerSourceName prop
1.9: Provides a fallback default or render guard for absent selected Alertmanager in SilencesTable.tsx for the /alerting/silences route
1.10: Moves GrafanaAlertmanagerDeliveryWarning rendering into all 3 inner silence views (NewSilencePage, ExistingSilenceEditor, SilencesTable) so every route owns its delivery warning independently
1.11: Removes the obsolete public/app/features/alerting/unified/hooks/useSilenceNavData.ts hook after page navigation becomes static per route
3.1: Removes the obsolete public/app/features/alerting/unified/Silences.tsx module after the route split
4.1: Changes any public silence route paths at /alerting/silences, /alerting/silence/new, or /alerting/silence/:id/edit
4.2: Modifies files ending in .test.tsx, .test.ts, .spec.tsx, .spec.ts, or any other test infrastructure file
